response.justification: Bogdan brings ~15 years of broad full-stack and systems experience, including high-throughput low-latency services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec) and a CS degree, which satisfies the core engineering bar. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the defining requirements of this Growth/Experimentation role. Seniority tops out at Staff rather than demonstrated Principal/IC6-level cross-org technical leadership. He could be a fit for a generalist senior role, but the specialization gap is significant for this position.
strengths: Deep, varied engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Proven high-scale, low-latency service experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) and AI-agent/tooling exposure
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience
Limited explicit data/statistics, telemetry, and metrics-analysis background
Seniority and scope read as Staff-level, short of Principal/IC6 cross-org leadership
